questions.question: A prospect wants a flexible stay instead of a year-long lease. Which rental type fits best?
evaluation_criteria: Identifies short-term rental as the correct rental type
Keeps the answer concise and direct

questions.question: A renter says buying a home feels too expensive, so they prefer renting. What demand driver is this?
evaluation_criteria: Connects renter preference to homeownership affordability
